overview: Allow content authors to favourite assets with a single heart icon click on the card. Favourites are stored in localStorage. A favourites tray icon in the header shows the count and opens a compact dropdown panel where users can review, remove, and export their saved assets.
goals: One-click favouriting via a heart icon on each asset card
Favourites persisted in localStorage — survive page refresh
Header favourites icon shows live count badge
Dropdown tray lists all favourited assets with thumbnail, title, and remove button
Export action copies all favourited CDN URLs to clipboard
nonGoals: No sharing of favourite lists between users
No ZIP download of images — export is CDN URL list only
successMetrics: Clicking the heart on a card adds it to favourites instantly; clicking again removes it
Heart icon is filled/navy when asset is favourited, outline/grey when not
Header badge shows correct count and updates immediately on toggle
Dropdown lists all favourited assets with thumbnail and title
Export copies a newline-separated list of CDN URLs to clipboard and shows confirmation

stack.persistence: localStorage key 'dam_favourites', value JSON array of asset IDs

uiNotes: Heart icon on card: positioned top-left of the thumbnail image (position absolute). Size 28px × 28px, circular, semi-transparent dark background (rgba(0,0,0,0.35)) at rest. Icon: ♡ (outline) when not favourited, ♥ (filled) when favourited. Filled colour: #EF4444 (red). Always visible — not only on hover. Transition: transform scale(1.2) for 150ms on toggle for a satisfying click feel.

Header favourites icon: placed to the right of the Upload button (always visible, not gated by admin mode). Icon: ♥ heart symbol, 20px, navy (#001B6B). Wrapped in a 36×36px circular button, background transparent, border none. Count badge: navy circle (#001B6B) with white text, 16px diameter, font 10px/700, positioned top-right of the icon. Badge only shown when count > 0.

Favourites dropdown: appears below the header icon on click. Width 320px, max-height 480px, overflow-y auto (scrollbar hidden). Background #FFFFFF, border-radius 12px, box-shadow '0 8px 32px rgba(11,21,96,0.14), 0 2px 8px rgba(11,21,96,0.06)'. Positioned right-aligned to the header icon.
Dropdown header: 'Favourites' label (14px/600, color #111827) left, count in muted text right, padding 14px 16px, border-bottom 1px solid #F3F4F6.

Dropdown item: display flex, align-items center, gap 10px, padding 10px 16px. Thumbnail: 44×44px, object-fit cover, border-radius 6px. Title: 13px/500 color #111827, flex 1, 2-line clamp. Remove button: × symbol, 16px, color #9CA3AF, hover color #EF4444, background none, border none, cursor pointer, flex-shrink 0.

Dropdown footer (shown when at least 1 item): border-top 1px solid #F3F4F6, padding 12px 16px, display flex, justify-content space-between. Left: 'Clear all' button (12px, color #9CA3AF, hover #EF4444, background none, border none). Right: 'Export CDN URLs' button (12px/600, color #001B6B, background rgba(0,27,107,0.07), border none, border-radius 6px, padding 6px 12px).
Dropdown empty state: centered text 'No favourites yet' (13px, color #9CA3AF), heart icon above, padding 32px 16px.
Export behaviour: collect cdn_url from each favourited asset. Assets without a cdn_url are skipped. Join with newline. Copy to clipboard. Button label swaps to '✓ Copied!' for 2000ms.
Clicking outside the dropdown closes it. Clicking the header icon toggles it.
The dropdown does not close when interacting with items inside it.

dataModel.description: Stored in localStorage as a JSON array of asset ID strings
fields: Value: JSON.stringify(string[]) — array of asset IDs
Companion data (display): the full asset objects are fetched from GET /api/assets?ids=... OR cached from the grid response

rules: Favourites state is initialised from localStorage on app mount. Default: empty array.
useFavourites custom hook in client/src/hooks/useFavourites.js manages state: { favouriteIds, toggle(id), clear(), isFavourited(id) }. Writes to localStorage on every change.
The hook is initialised in App.jsx and passed down as props: favouriteIds, onFavouriteToggle, isFavourited.
AssetCard receives isFavourited(asset.id) and onFavouriteToggle(asset.id) props.
The heart button click calls e.stopPropagation() to prevent the card click (modal open) from firing.

The favourites dropdown needs the full asset objects (thumbnail, title, cdn_url) to render. Fetch GET /api/assets?show_all_variants=1&limit=200 on mount and cache in App.jsx state as allAssets. Filter by favouriteIds in the dropdown.
Alternatively: store minimal asset data {id, display_title, thumbnail_path, cdn_url} in localStorage alongside the IDs to avoid the extra fetch. Use this approach.
localStorage item key: 'dam_favourites_data', value: JSON.stringify({ [id]: { display_title, thumbnail_path, cdn_url } })
On toggle(asset): if adding, write asset data to 'dam_favourites_data'; if removing, delete the key.
Export: filters out assets with no cdn_url, joins remaining cdn_urls with newline, copies to clipboard.
'Clear all' removes all IDs from localStorage and clears both keys.

stories.title: useFavourites hook — localStorage state management
stories.description: As a developer, I want a custom hook that manages favourites state in localStorage so all components share a single source of truth.
acceptanceCriteria: client/src/hooks/useFavourites.js exports useFavourites() hook
Hook returns { favouriteIds: string[], isFavourited(id): boolean, toggle(id, assetData): void, clear(): void, count: number }
Initialises favouriteIds from localStorage key 'dam_favourites' on mount (JSON.parse, default [])
toggle(id, assetData): if id in favouriteIds → remove it and delete from 'dam_favourites_data'; if not → add it and write { display_title, thumbnail_path, cdn_url } to 'dam_favourites_data'
Every state change writes updated array to localStorage 'dam_favourites'
clear(): empties favouriteIds, removes both localStorage keys
App.jsx calls useFavourites() and passes { favouriteIds, isFavourited, toggle: onFavouriteToggle, clear, count } as props to BrowsePage
Example: toggle('asset-1', data) → localStorage 'dam_favourites' contains ['asset-1']
Negative case: toggling the same ID twice returns to empty array
npm run lint passes
npm run build passes

stories.title: Heart icon on asset cards
stories.description: As a content author, I want to favourite an asset with one click from the grid so I can build a shortlist without opening the detail modal.
acceptanceCriteria: AssetCard receives isFavourited (boolean) and onFavouriteToggle (function) props
A heart button is rendered top-left of the thumbnail image, position absolute, top 8px left 8px
Button: 28×28px, border-radius 50%, background rgba(0,0,0,0.35), border none, cursor pointer, display flex, align-items center, justify-content center
Icon: ♡ (not favourited) or ♥ (favourited), font-size 14px
Not favourited: icon color #FFFFFF
Favourited: icon color #EF4444
On click: calls e.stopPropagation() then onFavouriteToggle(asset.id, { display_title: asset.display_title, thumbnail_path: asset.thumbnail_path, cdn_url: asset.cdn_url })
On toggle: button animates transform scale(1.2) → scale(1) over 150ms
BrowsePage passes isFavourited={isFavourited(asset.id)} and onFavouriteToggle={onFavouriteToggle} to each AssetCard
Example: clicking ♡ on a card immediately shows ♥ in red
Negative case: clicking ♥ on an already-favourited card removes it and shows ♡
npm run lint passes
npm run build passes

stories.title: Header favourites icon with count badge and dropdown tray
stories.description: As a content author, I want to see my saved favourites at a glance and manage them from the header so I can quickly review my shortlist.
acceptanceCriteria: Header receives count and onFavouriteIconClick props
A favourites button is rendered to the right of the Upload button (always visible)
Button: 36×36px circular, background transparent, border none, cursor pointer, contains ♥ icon (20px, color #001B6B)
Count badge: shown when count > 0. Navy circle (#001B6B), 16px diameter, white text 10px/700, position absolute top-right of the icon
A FavouritesDropdown component renders below the icon when open
Dropdown: 320px wide, max-height 480px, scrollbar hidden, background #FFFFFF, border-radius 12px, box-shadow as per uiNotes, position absolute top 48px right 0, z-index 200
Dropdown header: 'Favourites' label left, count right, padding 14px 16px, border-bottom
Dropdown items: read from localStorage 'dam_favourites_data'. Each item shows 44×44px thumbnail, display_title (2-line clamp), × remove button
× remove button calls onFavouriteToggle(id) and updates display immediately
Dropdown footer (count > 0): 'Clear all' button left, 'Export CDN URLs' button right
'Export CDN URLs': collects cdn_url from stored data (skip nulls), joins with newline, copies to clipboard, button shows '✓ Copied!' for 2000ms
'Clear all': calls clear() and closes dropdown
Empty state: shows heart icon and 'No favourites yet' centered
Clicking outside the dropdown closes it (useEffect with mousedown listener)
Example: 3 assets favourited → badge shows '3', dropdown lists all 3 with thumbnails
Negative case: asset with no cdn_url is listed in dropdown but skipped in export
npm run lint passes
npm run build passes
